subject: [POLICY] add env passwords to api/pap/xacml/dist
commit_message:
[POLICY] add env passwords to api/pap/xacml/dist

keystore and truststore passwords are now stored as
secrets to be accessed by environment variables.

Issue-ID: POLICY-2575
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: I5831f5c7bc040d036c38c321b5cc87848e80ca48

Patch Set 1:

@krzysztof, @sylvain, this is a port to frankfurt release of the abandoned review in master  (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/109215).   The idea was to have it in Frankfurt, can make its maintenance easier on our side.   So, this will only apply in Frankfurt.   In guilin, we'll plan to do the certInitializer work instead.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

If you strongly prefer to have .gitreview in a separate review please let the policy guys now. If not then you can just merge if it looks good to you
